(5) PyPSA-Eur (PyPSA/pypsa-eur, MIT, ~400 stars) — sector-coupled EU energy system optimisation model. (6) GridLAB-D (gridlab-d/gridlabd, BSD-3, ~350 stars) — PNNL/DoE distribution grid simulator, EV charging, demand response.
